focus_area: Critical security burn-down, test restoration, and SAST baseline

findings.title: Spring JWT and Stripe secrets were committed as fixed literals
findings.root_cause: Production defaults embedded sensitive key material in source configuration.
findings.recommended_fix: Read JWT_SECRET and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY from the runtime environment and fail fast when JWT_SECRET is missing.

findings.title: FastAPI service-token authentication failed open outside configured secrets
findings.root_cause: Missing token configuration skipped auth checks.
findings.recommended_fix: Permit missing tokens only in explicit dev/local/test mode; return 503 in production-like environments.

findings.title: Demo seed data with known admin passwords was packaged with backend resources
evidence: Verification: target/classes/Files/Data/data.json is absent after clean build
findings.root_cause: Large demo import file lived under src/main/resources without an artifact exclusion.
findings.recommended_fix: Exclude the demo file from production artifacts and load it only by explicit external seed path.

findings.title: N8N service intent matcher produced a false positive for general chat
evidence: Before: tests/test_service_detector.py::test_detect_no_service failed; 'Tell me a joke' matched submit-feedback
findings.root_cause: Short fuzzy keyword 'tell us' scored 72.7 against unrelated text and exceeded the 70 threshold.
findings.recommended_fix: Use boundary-aware exact matching and skip fuzzy scoring for very short keywords.

findings.title: Flutter smoke test was stale counter-template coverage
evidence: Before: expected counter text and plus icon in an app that no longer has counter UI
findings.root_cause: Default Flutter template test was never replaced with app-specific shell coverage.
findings.recommended_fix: Assert the actual unauthenticated app shell renders.

fixes_implemented.title: Move backend secrets to environment variables and fail fast for JWT
changes: jwt.secret now resolves from JWT_SECRET with no committed fallback
stripe.secret.key now resolves from STRIPE_SECRET_KEY with no committed fallback
JwtService validates JWT_SECRET at startup and requires at least 256 bits
fixes_implemented.migration_path: Set JWT_SECRET before starting backend. Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY before using payment endpoints.

fixes_implemented.title: Make FastAPI service auth fail closed outside dev/test
changes: Missing service token is allowed only for dev/local/test
Token comparison now uses constant-time compare_digest
Added regression tests for missing, invalid, and valid token paths
fixes_implemented.migration_path: Set SCOUTING_SERVICE_TOKEN and ACADEMY_RANKING_AI_SERVICE_TOKEN in non-dev environments.

fixes_implemented.title: Exclude packaged demo seed data from backend resources
changes: Verified a clean Maven build does not copy it to target/classes
fixes_implemented.migration_path: Use app.seed.file with an external file path for intentional demo imports.

fixes_implemented.title: Tighten N8N keyword matching
changes: Preserved fuzzy matching for longer keywords

fixes_implemented.title: Replace stale Flutter counter test
changes: Smoke test now asserts the actual MaterialApp shell renders

fixes_implemented.title: Add generated artifact ignores and Python SAST baseline
changes: Ignore __pycache__, pyc files, pytest cache, and local audit dependencies
Bandit scan now reports zero findings for Python service code

passed: n8n-service-orchestration: python -m pytest tests -v -> 23 passed, 2 deprecation warnings
Python compile checks: compileall app/tests/service-registry -> passed
blocked_or_deferred: Full Flutter analyze remains noisy from the existing baseline and was not burned down in this pass
Full dependency CVE scanning was not run for Java/Flutter/Python lockfiles in this pass
No live database was available for query-plan/index verification

coverage.after: Test counts improved; coverage tooling still needs CI setup
coverage.delta: Added 8 FastAPI auth regression tests and restored one Flutter smoke test

notes: AI service token auth now fails closed outside dev/local/test
Packaged demo seed removed from backend runtime artifact
Python Bandit scan is clean for scanned service code

performance.latency: Not materially affected; service-auth checks are constant-time string/config checks
performance.notes: No load test was run in this pass.

architecture_changes.summary: Security posture tightened without changing service topology. Production runtime now requires explicit JWT and service-token configuration.
breaking_change_details: Backend startup now fails when JWT_SECRET is missing or too short
FastAPI compute services reject production-like traffic when service tokens are not configured

next_steps: Add CI pipeline that runs Maven clean test, pytest, flutter test, and Bandit
Add Spring Actuator/Prometheus and correlation IDs across backend and AI services
Add contract tests generated from Spring OpenAPI and FastAPI schemas
Run dependency vulnerability scans with Maven/Flutter/Python lockfile tooling
Address CSRF split-chain risk for cookie-backed admin web routes
convergence_status: Partial - critical config/auth/test failures improved; production readiness still requires CI, observability, dependency scanning, CSRF review, DB profiling, and load testing.
